<!--
Canonical Contribution Traceability issue — see DOCUMENTATION/CONTRIBUTION_TRACEABILITY.md.
The Source and Resolution Hooks sections are REQUIRED. Do not remove them.
Title prefix convention: [Dialogue] | [Bug] | [Feat] | [Audit] | [Design] | [Meta]
-->

## Source

- **Channel**: <!-- Telegram | Discord | Twitter | Call | Conversation | RSS | Direct -->
- **Contributor**: <!-- @handle (0x-address if known) -->
- **Date**: <!-- YYYY-MM-DD -->
- **Original**: <!-- link, quoted text, or "private — see off-repo archive" for NDA material -->

## Context

<!-- What is the idea / question / observation? Preserve the original framing; don't pre-solve. -->

## Why it matters

<!-- Why is this worth surfacing to the chain? What's the consequence of ignoring it? -->

## Resolution Hooks

- [ ] Solution artifact (commit SHA / file path / spec URL)
- [ ] ContributionDAG attribution-ID (claimId from ContributionAttestor)
- [ ] Closing comment posted with chain references

<!--
On resolution, the closing comment should follow this format (see DOCUMENTATION/CONTRIBUTION_TRACEABILITY.md §Layer 4):

Closing — <one-line summary>.

**Solution**:
- <artifact 1>
- <artifact 2>

**DAG Attribution**: `0x<claimId>` ([explorer link])
**Source**: <Channel> / @<Contributor> / <Date>
**Lineage**: <parent claimIds, if any>
-->
